blocks.text: I'm a designer and developer who builds clean, modern websites. Take a look around to see my work and learn more about what I do.

cards.title: Brand Redesign
cards.description: Complete visual identity overhaul for a tech startup, including logo, color system, and website.

cards.title: E-Commerce Platform
cards.description: Built a high-performance online store with custom product pages and checkout flow.

cards.title: SaaS Dashboard
cards.description: Designed and developed an analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization.

cards.title: Mobile App
cards.description: Cross-platform mobile app for a fitness brand with workout tracking and social features.
